claim_boundary: SYNTHETIC positive controls with KNOWN ground truth. Each family has a paired negative sibling the pipeline MUST score below pass_threshold. PC5 pass rule is INVERTED (pass = lookahead caught). PASS on these controls does NOT prove real-world detection, does NOT prove bank-level validation, does NOT prove systemic-risk prediction, does NOT authorise any canonical run. No real data referenced.
